since_last: 60% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.96%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.58% · BTC +0.48% · Gold +0.84% · Nasdaq100 -1.41%. 60% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.96%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.96%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -5.07%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +9.89%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +9.89%, META +8.10%, PLTR +5.91%, WDAY +5.10%, CRM +5.00%. Laggards: KLAC -8.86%, TER -8.76%, LRCX -8.09%, AMAT -8.05%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.91% at $165.88
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.91% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
